fixes_applied.description: Created missing GitHub Actions workflow file to enable CI/CD pipeline
changes_made: Added build.yml workflow with workflow_dispatch trigger
Configured Maven build steps with JDK 17
Added JaCoCo code coverage report generation
Configured artifact upload for build outputs and test results
Added support for configurable source_folder input parameter

errors_resolved: ERR-001: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors_remaining: ERR-002: Workflow Dispatch API Authentication/Permission Issue (requires manual token update)
ERR-003: GitHub Actions Potentially Disabled (requires repository settings verification)
next_steps: Verify GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
Validate GitHub token has workflow scope permissions
Create code/ folder with Maven project structure
Trigger test build to verify workflow execution
compliance_notes: Workflow file follows standard Maven build configuration
JaCoCo plugin integration maintained for code coverage
Artifact retention set to 7 days per policy
Workflow supports both manual dispatch and automatic triggers
